LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Numbers.answer:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                           (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                              (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                 (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                    (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                       (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                          (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                             (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                   (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                      (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                         (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                           (Agda.
                                                                            Builtin.
                                                                            Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                              (Agda.
                                                                               Builtin.
                                                                               Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                 (Agda.
                                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                    (Agda.
                                                                                     Builtin.
                                                                                     Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                       (Agda.
                                                                                        Builtin.
                                                                                        Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                          (Agda.
                                                                                           Builtin.
                                                                                           Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                             (Agda.
                                                                                              Builtin.
                                                                                              Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                (Agda.
                                                                                                 Builtin.
                                                                                                 Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                   (Agda.
                                                                                                    Builtin.
                                                                                                    Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                      (Agda.
                                                                                                       Builtin.
                                                                                                       Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                         (Agda.
                                                                                                          Builtin.
                                                                                                          Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                            (Agda.
                                                                                                             Builtin.
                                                                                                             Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                               (Agda.
                                                                                                                Builtin.
                                                                                                                Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                  (Agda.
                                                                                                                   Builtin.
                                                                                                                   Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                     (Agda.
                                                                                                                      Builtin.
                                                                                                                      Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                        (Agda.
                                                                                                                         Builtin.
                                                                                                                         Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                           (Agda.
                                                                                                                            Builtin.
                                                                                                                            Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                              (Agda.
                                                                                                                               Builtin.
                                                                                                                               Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                 (Agda.
                                                                                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                    (Agda.
                                                                                                                                     Builtin.
                                                                                                                                     Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                       Agda.
                                                                                                                                       Builtin.
                                                                                                                                       Nat.Nat{0}{0})))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ →
                 case<Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0},0> @1 of
                   λ<[]> @0
                   λ<[_]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} (@3 @0 @1)

Numbers.add_answer:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_ @0 (Numbers.answer)

Numbers.add:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ _ → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_ @1 @0

Numbers.add3:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.
                                       Builtin.
                                       Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                                 Builtin.
                                                                                 Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ _ _ →
            Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_ (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_ @2 @1) @0

Numbers.add3b:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.
                                       Builtin.
                                       Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                                 Builtin.
                                                                                 Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ _ _ → Numbers.add @2 (Numbers.add @1 @0)

Numbers.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: Numbers.add3b (Numbers.add_answer Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0})
            (Numbers.add Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0} Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0})
            (Numbers.add3 Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0} Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
               Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0})

Numbers.suc:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ →
            Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_ @0
              (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0})
